betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§o"By studying mundane projectiles, I have learned a way to project vis in a similar manner."§r

§6This quest will allow you to complete Focus Medium - Projectile without needing to be hit by the various projectile types in the normal research. Llamas will not spit making this research impossible to complete in normal circumstances.

0:10.command:8:
#Execute /thaumcraft research to add Focus Projectile to player
tc research @s FOCUSPROJECTILE
0:10.description:8: A command will run to complete 'Focus Medium - Projectile'
